title: fltMC.exe
html:
fltMC.exe

Filter Manager Control Program used by Windows

Tamper

Defense evasion

fltMC.exe unload SysmonDrv

Unloads a driver used by security agents — MITRE: T1562.001 — Privileges: Admin
